upscaler.title: AI Upscaling
upscaler.description: Enhance image and video quality using AI models
upscaler.error_no_input: ⚠️ Please upload an image or video

face_enhance.title: AI Enhancement (NO Upscaling)
face_enhance.description: Enhance image and video details WITHOUT upscaling using advanced AI algorithms
face_enhance.input_type_info: Select whether to process an image or video
face_enhance.model_info: Select the enhancement model to apply
face_enhance.error_no_input: ⚠️ Please upload an image or video
face_enhance.tips_content:
- **Classic Sharpen**: Quick and light sharpening, ideal for general improvements
- **Edge Enhancement**: Accentuates edges and fine details
- **Denoise Medium**: Reduces noise while preserving details
- **Denoise Strong**: Aggressive noise removal for very noisy videos
- **GFPGAN Face Restore**: Specialized AI for restoring face details (requires GPU)

⚠️ AI models are downloaded automatically on first use.

lipsync.title: AI Lip Sync
lipsync.description: Synchronize lips in images/videos with audio using advanced AI models
lipsync.resize_info: Resize factor (1 = original, useful for large videos)
lipsync.nosmooth_info: Disable temporal smoothing (may improve quality in some cases)
lipsync.face_det_batch_size_info: Higher values improve throughput on large GPUs; lower if face detection fails
lipsync.wav2lip_batch_size_info: Higher values speed up GAN inference on high-VRAM GPUs such as A100
lipsync.processing_mode_info: Audio-only: lip sync only | Audio+Video: body animation + lip sync (LivePortrait only)
lipsync.use_webcam_info: Record driving video from webcam instead of uploading file
lipsync.tips_content:
- **Wav2Lip**: Ideal for quick previews and tests. Fast but basic quality.
- **Wav2Lip GAN**: Best quality/speed compromise. Recommended for most uses.
- **SadTalker**: For animating static portraits with natural expressions. Preserves full image. Images only.
- **Video-Retalking**: Maximum quality but requires time. For professional productions.

⚠️ Models are downloaded automatically on first use (may take a few minutes).
lipsync.error_no_input: ❌ Please upload an image or video
lipsync.duration_warning_requirement: The **video must be shorter or equal** to the audio duration
lipsync.duration_warning_video_longer: If the video is longer than the audio, only the portion matching the audio duration will be synced
lipsync.duration_warning_audio_longer: If the audio is longer than the video, the video will be extended/repeated automatically
lipsync.duration_warning_suggestion: 💡 **Tip:** Use videos with the same duration as the audio to avoid synchronization issues.
lipsync.duration_check_video_longer_msg:
⚠️ WARNING: Video ({video_duration:.1f}s) is longer than audio ({audio_duration:.1f}s) by {difference:.1f} seconds.

Lip sync will only be applied for the audio duration. The final part of the video ({difference:.1f}s) will remain without lip synchronization.
lipsync.duration_check_audio_longer_msg:
ℹ️ INFO: Audio ({audio_duration:.1f}s) is longer than video ({video_duration:.1f}s).

The video will be repeated/extended automatically to cover the entire audio duration.
lipsync.duration_check_continue_prompt:
⚠️ Do you want to continue anyway? If yes, restart the generation.

For optimal results, use a video with the same duration (or shorter) than the audio.

sadtalker.description: Complete animation - Includes expressions and movements (preserves full image)
sadtalker.best_for: Static portrait animation with maximum realism, full scene preservation

video_retalking.best_for: Professional production where quality is priority

liveportrait.description: Face + upper torso animation - Natural body movements
liveportrait.best_for: Portrait animation with upper body movements

thegargantuas_lipsync.description: 🔥 Hybrid pipeline - Wav2Lip GAN + GFPGAN face enhancement
thegargantuas_lipsync.best_for: Highest quality lip-sync with automatic face restoration. Ideal for productions where both lip-sync and face quality are important.

ai_bg_remover.title: AI Background Remover
ai_bg_remover.description: Automatically remove backgrounds from images using AI
ai_bg_remover.examples_text: Upload an image, choose background type, and click 'Remove Background'

img_to_video.title: AI Image to Video
img_to_video.description: Generate videos from images using Stable Video Diffusion
img_to_video.inference_steps_info: More steps = better quality but slower (recommended: 25)
img_to_video.model_loading: Loading Stable Video Diffusion model (first time: ~9.5GB download)...
